name: MD Planner MCP Server
description: Markdown-based project management MCP server with directory storage.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List all tasks in the project. Filter by section, project, or milestone.

section.description: Filter by section name e.g. 'Todo', 'In Progress', 'Done'

assignee.description: Filter by assignee person ID (matches config.assignee)

priority.description: Filter by priority level (1 = highest, 5 = lowest)

completed.description: Filter by completion state (false = open only, true = completed only)

tags.description: Filter by tags — returns tasks that have ANY of the given tags

ready.description: Dependency-aware filter. true = tasks whose blocked_by are all Done or completed. false = tasks with open blockers. Evaluated after all other filters.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get a single task by its ID.

tools.name: get_task_by_name
tools.description: Get a task by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_tasks when the exact title is known.

tools.name: get_task_slim
tools.description: Get a minimal view of a task by ID. Returns only id, title, description, section, milestone, blockedBy, and the last N comments. Omits config fields, timestamps, revision, assignee, effort, dates, and files. Use instead of get_task to reduce token usage when full task details are not needed.

last_comments.description: Number of most-recent comments to include (default: 5, max: 20)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in the project.

parentId.description: Parent task ID — creates this task as a subtask

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task's fields.

blocked_by.description: List of task IDs this task is blocked by

files.description: Relevant source file paths (relative to codebase root). Surfaced in get_context_pack as relevantFiles.

claimed_by.description: Person ID of the agent actively working on this task

claimed_at.description: ISO timestamp when the task was claimed

expected_revision.description: If provided, reject with REVISION_CONFLICT when the task's current revision does not match. Use for optimistic locking in multi-agent scenarios.

agent_id.description: Person ID of the calling agent. When provided, In Progress tasks claimed by a different agent are rejected with CLAIM_GUARD error.

tools.name: add_task_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a task's comment thread. Use this to track progress, note what was done, or record a commit hash. Comments are stored separately from the task description.

comment.description: Comment text. E.g. '[v0.7.1] Fixed by commit abc1234 — ...'

author.description: Author name (defaults to 'Claude' when called from MCP)

metadata.description: Structured metadata for machine-readable progress. Predefined keys: action (started|progress|completed|blocked|deferred), commit, branch, files_changed, next_step

tools.name: add_task_attachments
tools.description: Add file attachment paths to a task's attachments frontmatter field.

paths.description: List of file paths relative to the project directory (e.g. ['uploads/2026/03/01/file.pdf'])

tools.name: move_task
tools.description: Move a task to a different section (column). Optionally specify a position for ordered placement.

position.description: Zero-based position within the section (omit to append at end)

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Delete a task by its ID.

tools.name: claim_task
tools.description: Atomically claim a task: move it to 'In Progress' and assign it. Fails with CLAIM_CONFLICT if the task is not in the expected section (default: 'Todo'). Use this instead of update_task when multiple agents may compete for the same task.

expected_section.description: Section the task must be in to claim it (default: 'Todo')

expected_revision.description: If provided, reject with REVISION_CONFLICT when the task's current revision does not match.

tools.name: batch_update_tasks
tools.description: Update multiple tasks in a single call. Each entry follows the same fields as update_task. Returns per-task success/error results. Use this to move a batch to In Progress, add comments to several tasks, or move a batch to Done in one round-trip.

expected_revision.description: Optimistic locking — reject if revision mismatch

agent_id.description: Claim guard — reject if task claimed by different agent

comment.description: If provided, add this comment to the task after updating

comment_metadata.description: Structured metadata for the inline comment

updates.description: Array of task updates (1-50). Each entry needs at least an id.

tools.name: get_next_task
tools.description: Find the highest-priority ready task matching an agent's skills. Cross-references task tags with the agent's person.skills array, sorted by priority. Falls back to untagged tasks, then any task. Returns one task or null.

exclude_tags.description: Skip tasks that have ANY of these tags

tools.name: sweep_stale_claims
tools.description: Release tasks whose claim has expired. Scans In Progress tasks where claimedAt + TTL has passed, moves them back to Todo, clears claimedBy/claimedAt, and adds a system comment. Returns the list of released task IDs.

ttl_minutes.description: Claim TTL in minutes (default: 30). Tasks claimed longer ago are released.

tools.name: request_approval
tools.description: Submit a task for human review. Call this instead of moving the task to Done. Attaches a structured summary (with optional commit hash) and moves the task to 'Pending Review'. At the next boot session the verdict will appear in inProgress tasks (if rejected) or the task will be in Done (if approved).

summary.description: What was done — markdown. Include what changed, why, and how to verify.

requested_by.description: Person ID of the requesting agent (defaults to current task assignee)

artifact_urls.description: Links to PRs, releases, or previews

tools.name: approve_task
tools.description: Approve a task in 'Pending Review'. Moves it to Done. Typically called by the human owner or a delegated reviewer.

tools.name: reject_task
tools.description: Reject a task in 'Pending Review'. Moves it back to In Progress and reassigns to the original requesting agent. Structured rejection type allows the agent to route without parsing prose feedback.

feedback.description: Explanation of what needs to change (required on rejection)

tools.name: list_pending_approvals
tools.description: List all tasks in 'Pending Review' — the human owner's review queue. Returns stubs: id, title, requestedBy, requestedAt, summary excerpt, commit hash.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: List all notes in the project. Filter by title or project to stay focused.

project.description: Filter by portfolio project name (exact match, case-insensitive). Use this to scope notes to a specific codebase or project.

tools.name: get_note
tools.description: Get a single note by its ID, including full content.

tools.name: get_notes_batch
tools.description: Fetch multiple notes by ID in one call. Returns full content for each found note and lists IDs that were not found. Use this after get_context_pack returns note stubs to avoid N sequential get_note round-trips.

ids.description: Array of note IDs to fetch

tools.name: get_note_by_name
tools.description: Get a note by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_notes when the exact title is known.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a new note.

project.description: Portfolio project name to associate with this note

tools.name: update_note
tools.description: Update an existing note's title, content, or project.

project.description: Portfolio project name to associate with this note

tools.name: delete_note
tools.description: Delete a note by its ID.

tools.name: list_goals
tools.description: List all goals in the project. Optionally filter by status.

tools.name: get_goal
tools.description: Get a single goal by its ID.

tools.name: get_goal_by_name
tools.description: Get a goal by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_goals when the title is known.

tools.name: create_goal
tools.description: Create a new goal in the project.

tools.name: update_goal
tools.description: Update an existing goal's fields.

tools.name: delete_goal
tools.description: Delete a goal by its ID.

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List all meetings sorted by date descending.

date_from.description: Only include meetings on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

date_to.description: Only include meetings on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

open_actions_only.description: Only include meetings that have at least one open action item

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Get a single meeting by its ID, including agenda, notes, and action items.

tools.name: get_meeting_by_name
tools.description: Get a meeting by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_meetings when the title is known.

tools.name: create_meeting
tools.description: Create a new meeting record.

attendees.description: List of attendee names or person IDs

tools.name: update_meeting
tools.description: Update an existing meeting's fields.

actions.description: Full replacement list of action items

tools.name: delete_meeting
tools.description: Delete a meeting by its ID.

tools.name: list_journal_entries
tools.description: List all journal entries sorted by date descending.

tools.name: get_journal_entry
tools.description: Get a single journal entry by its ID, including full body.

tools.name: create_journal_entry
tools.description: Create a new journal entry.

tools.name: update_journal_entry
tools.description: Update an existing journal entry's fields.

tools.name: delete_journal_entry
tools.description: Delete a journal entry by its ID.

tools.name: list_people
tools.description: List all people in the project's people registry.

tools.name: get_person
tools.description: Get a single person by their ID.

tools.name: get_people_tree
tools.description: Get the org chart as a hierarchical tree. Each node has a person record with a 'children' array of their direct reports.

tools.name: get_people_summary
tools.description: Get people registry summary statistics: total headcount, breakdown by department, managers count.

tools.name: get_people_departments
tools.description: List all department names used in the people registry.

tools.name: get_person_reports
tools.description: Get the direct reports for a given person.

tools.name: create_person
tools.description: Add a new person to the people registry.

hoursPerDay.description: Working hours per day (used by capacity planning)

agentType.description: Agent type: human, ai, or hybrid

models.description: AI models this agent can use

systemPrompt.description: Default system prompt / persona for AI agents

tools.name: update_person
tools.description: Update an existing person's fields.

agentType.description: Agent type: human, ai, or hybrid

models.description: AI models this agent can use

systemPrompt.description: Default system prompt / persona for AI agents

lastSeen.description: ISO timestamp of last agent interaction (auto-set or manual)

currentTaskId.description: Task ID the agent is currently working on

tools.name: delete_person
tools.description: Delete a person from the registry by their ID.

tools.name: agent_heartbeat
tools.description: Update an agent's lastSeen timestamp and optionally set status and currentTaskId. Call periodically to signal the agent is alive.

currentTaskId.description: Task ID the agent is currently working on (empty string to clear)

tools.name: get_project_config
tools.description: Get project metadata: name, description, status, features, and configuration.

tools.name: update_project_config
tools.description: Update project name, description, and/or feature visibility configuration.

features.description: Enabled feature keys (e.g. ['tasks','notes','goals']). Replaces the full features list.

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Get cross-entity project health analytics: task completion rates, goal progress, open action items, storage usage, people count, and more.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across all entity types (tasks, notes, goals, meetings, people, etc.). Requires the server to be started with the --cache flag.

types.description: Optional list of entity types to restrict the search (e.g. ['task', 'note', 'goal', 'meeting', 'person'])

tools.name: list_milestones
tools.description: List all milestones in the project.

tools.name: get_milestone
tools.description: Get a single milestone by its ID.

tools.name: get_milestone_by_name
tools.description: Get a milestone by its name (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_milestones when the name is known.

tools.name: create_milestone
tools.description: Create a new milestone. project and name together must be unique — creating a duplicate returns an error.

project.description: Project this milestone belongs to (required to keep milestones unique per project)

description.description: Short description of what this milestone delivers (strongly recommended)

tools.name: update_milestone
tools.description: Update an existing milestone's fields.

tools.name: delete_milestone
tools.description: Delete a milestone by its ID.

tools.description: List all ideas in the project.

tools.name: get_idea
tools.description: Get a single idea by its ID.

tools.name: get_idea_by_name
tools.description: Get an idea by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_ideas when the title is known.

tools.name: create_idea
tools.description: Create a new idea.

tools.name: update_idea
tools.description: Update an existing idea's fields.

tools.name: delete_idea
tools.description: Delete an idea by its ID.

tools.name: get_brainstorm
tools.description: Get a single brainstorm by its ID.

tools.name: get_brainstorm_by_name
tools.description: Get a brainstorm by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_brainstorms when the title is known.

tools.name: create_brainstorm
tools.description: Create a new brainstorm session. Questions are H2-level prompts with optional answers.

tools.name: update_brainstorm
tools.description: Update an existing brainstorm's fields or questions.

tools.name: delete_brainstorm
tools.description: Delete a brainstorm by its ID.

tools.name: list_reflection_templates
tools.description: List all reflection templates in the project.

tools.name: get_reflection_template
tools.description: Get a single reflection template by its ID.

tools.name: get_reflection_template_by_name
tools.description: Get a reflection template by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_reflection_templates when the title is known.

tools.name: create_reflection_template
tools.description: Create a new reflection template — a reusable set of questions for recurring self-inquiry sessions.

questions.description: Question prompts (H2-level headers in the template file)

tools.name: update_reflection_template
tools.description: Update an existing reflection template.

tools.name: delete_reflection_template
tools.description: Delete a reflection template by its ID.

tools.name: list_reflections
tools.description: List all reflections in the project.

tools.name: get_reflection
tools.description: Get a single reflection by its ID.

tools.name: get_reflection_by_name
tools.description: Get a reflection by its title (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_reflections when the title is known.

tools.name: create_reflection
tools.description: Create a new reflection session. Optionally load questions from a template. Questions are H2-level prompts with optional answers.

template_id.description: Template ID to pre-populate questions from

tools.name: update_reflection
tools.description: Update an existing reflection's fields or answers. Reflections are immutable snapshots — changing the template does not alter existing reflections.

tools.name: delete_reflection
tools.description: Delete a reflection by its ID.

tools.name: list_portfolio
tools.description: List all portfolio projects.

status.description: Filter by status (e.g. active, completed, archived)

tools.name: get_portfolio_item
tools.description: Get a single portfolio project by its ID.

tools.name: get_portfolio_by_name
tools.description: Get a portfolio project by its name (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_portfolio when the project name is known.

tools.name: get_portfolio_summary
tools.description: Get aggregated portfolio statistics: total count, breakdown by status, breakdown by category, average progress, total revenue, total expenses.

tools.name: create_portfolio_item
tools.description: Create a new portfolio project.

status.description: Status (e.g. active, completed, archived, production, maintenance, cancelled)

team.description: Team member names or person IDs

logo.description: Logo path (relative to project dir) or external URL

billing_customer_id.description: Billing customer ID linking this project to a billing customer

brain_managed.description: Whether this project is managed by a brain protocol

tools.name: update_portfolio_item
tools.description: Update an existing portfolio project's fields.

brain_managed.description: Whether this project is managed by a brain protocol

tools.name: add_portfolio_status_update

tools.name: delete_portfolio_status_update

tools.name: delete_portfolio_item

tools.name: list_dns_records
tools.description: List DNS records for a specific domain. Returns records synced from Cloudflare or manually added.

tools.name: add_dns_record
tools.description: Add a DNS record to a domain.

type.description: Record type (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, SRV, etc.)

tools.name: update_dns_record
tools.description: Update a DNS record on a domain by its index in the records array.

record_index.description: Zero-based index of the record in the domain's dnsRecords array

tools.name: delete_dns_record
tools.description: Delete a DNS record from a domain by its index in the records array.

record_index.description: Zero-based index of the record to delete

tools.name: github_get_repo
tools.description: Fetch summary stats for a GitHub repository: stars, open issues, open PRs, last push date, license. Requires GitHub token configured in Settings.

tools.name: github_get_issue
tools.description: Fetch the state and details of a single GitHub issue by number.

tools.name: github_create_issue
tools.description: Create a new GitHub issue in a repository. Returns the created issue number and URL.

tools.name: github_set_issue_state
tools.description: Close or reopen a GitHub issue. Use state='closed' to close, state='open' to reopen.

tools.name: github_list_repos
tools.description: List GitHub repositories accessible to the authenticated user. Supports optional query filter.

query.description: Optional filter string to narrow results by repo full name

tools.name: github_get_pr
tools.description: Fetch the state and details of a single GitHub pull request by number.

tools.name: list_mindmaps
tools.description: List all mindmaps in the project.

tools.name: get_mindmap
tools.description: Get a single mindmap by its ID.

tools.name: create_mindmap
tools.description: Create a new mindmap.

nodes.description: Initial node tree. Each node: { id, text, level, children: [], parent? }

tools.name: update_mindmap
tools.description: Update an existing mindmap's title or node tree.

tools.name: delete_mindmap
tools.description: Delete a mindmap by its ID.

tools.name: list_marketing_plans
tools.description: List all marketing plans in the project.

tools.name: get_marketing_plan
tools.description: Get a single marketing plan by its ID.

tools.name: get_marketing_plan_by_name
tools.description: Get a marketing plan by its name (case-insensitive). Prefer this over list_marketing_plans when the name is known.

tools.name: create_marketing_plan
tools.description: Create a new marketing plan with strategy, channels, campaigns, and KPI targets.

tools.name: update_marketing_plan
tools.description: Update an existing marketing plan.

tools.name: delete_marketing_plan
tools.description: Delete a marketing plan by its ID.

tools.name: list_time_entries
tools.description: List all time entries across all tasks. Returns a map of taskId to entries array.

tools.name: get_time_entries_for_task
tools.description: Get all time entries for a specific task.

task_id.description: Task ID to get time entries for

tools.name: create_time_entry
tools.description: Log a time entry against a task. Returns the new entry ID.

task_id.description: Task ID to log time against

person.description: Person name or ID who did the work

description.description: What was done during this time

tools.name: delete_time_entry
tools.description: Delete a time entry from a task.

task_id.description: Task ID the entry belongs to

tools.name: list_c4_components
tools.description: List all C4 architecture components across all diagram levels.

tools.name: get_c4_component
tools.description: Get a single C4 component by its ID.

tools.name: get_c4_by_level
tools.description: Get all C4 components at a specific diagram level (context, container, component, code).

tools.name: create_c4_component
tools.description: Create a new C4 architecture component.

tools.name: update_c4_component
tools.description: Update an existing C4 component's fields.

tools.name: delete_c4_component
tools.description: Delete a C4 component by its ID.

tools.name: add_c4_connection
tools.description: Add a connection (dependency) between two C4 components.

tools.name: remove_c4_connection
tools.description: Remove a connection between two C4 components.

tools.name: list_strategic_levels
tools.description: List all Strategic Levels builders.

tools.name: get_strategic_levels
tools.description: Get a single Strategic Levels builder by its ID.

tools.name: create_strategic_levels
tools.description: Create a new Strategic Levels builder.

tools.name: update_strategic_levels
tools.description: Update an existing Strategic Levels builder.

tools.name: delete_strategic_levels
tools.description: Delete a Strategic Levels builder by its ID.

tools.name: add_strategic_level
tools.description: Add a level entry to a Strategic Levels builder.

level.description: Level type (vision, mission, goals, objectives, strategies, tactics)

tools.name: update_strategic_level
tools.description: Update a level entry within a Strategic Levels builder.

tools.name: remove_strategic_level
tools.description: Remove a level entry from a Strategic Levels builder.

tools.name: list_business_models
tools.description: List all Business Model Canvases.

tools.name: get_business_model
tools.description: Get a single Business Model Canvas by its ID.

tools.name: create_business_model
tools.description: Create a new Business Model Canvas.

tools.name: update_business_model
tools.description: Update an existing Business Model Canvas.

tools.name: delete_business_model
tools.description: Delete a Business Model Canvas by its ID.

tools.name: list_lean_canvases
tools.description: List all Lean Canvases.

tools.name: get_lean_canvas
tools.description: Get a single Lean Canvas by its ID.

tools.name: create_lean_canvas
tools.description: Create a new Lean Canvas.

unfairAdvantage.description: Cannot be easily copied or bought

highLevelConcept.description: X for Y analogy (e.g. YouTube for pets)

tools.name: update_lean_canvas
tools.description: Update an existing Lean Canvas.

tools.name: delete_lean_canvas
tools.description: Delete a Lean Canvas by its ID.

tools.name: list_project_value_boards
tools.description: List all Project Value Boards.

tools.name: get_project_value_board
tools.description: Get a single Project Value Board by its ID.

tools.name: create_project_value_board
tools.description: Create a new Project Value Board.

tools.name: update_project_value_board
tools.description: Update an existing Project Value Board.

tools.name: delete_project_value_board
tools.description: Delete a Project Value Board by its ID.

tools.name: get_context_pack
tools.description: Single-call agent boot. Returns people, active milestone, in-progress tasks, top-10 todo tasks, most recent progress note excerpt, and decision/architecture/constraint note titles. Replaces 8+ sequential MCP calls from Phase 1 Boot.

project.description: Project name to scope all entities (e.g. 'MD Planner')

milestone.description: Milestone name. Defaults to the most recently created open milestone.

prompts.name: session-start
prompts.description: Run the full Phase 1 boot sequence. Reads local-dev.md, loads context pack, checks git state.

arguments.name: project
arguments.description: MCP project name to scope context (e.g. 'MD Planner')

prompts.name: end-session
prompts.description: Close the session: write a progress note, create HANDOFF.md, and move completed in-progress tasks to Pending Review.

prompts.name: daily
prompts.description: Daily standup summary: tasks done, in-progress, and blocked for the project.

arguments.name: project
arguments.description: Project name to scope the summary

prompts.name: approve
prompts.description: Approve a task in Pending Review and move it to Done.

arguments.name: task_id
arguments.description: ID of the task to approve

prompts.name: next
prompts.description: Return the highest-priority ready task for the project — what to work on right now.

arguments.name: project
arguments.description: Project name to scope the search
